attributes.best_description:
Central Texas Adult Mixed Summer League 2026

Season starts May 31st - Aug 30th

Teams are comprised of mixed level players (C1,C2,B)

Ages 18-Up (Co-ed)

Games are on Sunday nights between 3:15-8:00pm @ The Crossover

 13 game guarantee with playoff game included 

No Games July 5th

Pricing $ 4,875 per team for 13 games

$1000 Deposit

Central Texas Adult Mixed Summer League 2026

Season starts May 31st - Aug 30th

 13 game guarantee with playoff game included

Pricing $ 4,875 per team for 13 games

Central Texas Adult Mixed Summer League 2026

Season starts May 31st - Aug 30th

Teams are comprised of mixed level players (C1,C2,B)

Ages 18-Up (Co-ed)

Games are on Sunday nights between 3:15-8:00pm @ The Crossover

 13 game guarantee with playoff game included 

No Games July 5th

Pricing $ 4,875 per team for 13 games

$1000 Deposit

1 Day Per Week "Lite" Hockey Games 

Ice and Field Crossover- Hockey Lite League

8 weeks - June 15th - Aug 5th

The league is intended for players with Game experiance, players that have played AMHA travel, Rec  Austin Capitols or players wanting to move into either travel or rec and would like to play against kids with more experiance.

Game days - Times
8U - Mon 5:45-6:45pm

Price: $240 + tax 

If your are able to coach, reach out to Matt Frick - matt@iceandfield.com

 

Combination of 3 v 3 games and pick up games

1 Day Per Week "Lite" Hockey Games 

Ice and Field Crossover- Hockey Lite League

8 weeks - June 15th - Aug 5th

The league is intended for players with Game experience, players that have played AMHA travel, Rec Austin Capitols or players wanting to move into either travel or rec and would like to play against kids with more experience.

Game days - Times

10U - Mon - 7:00-8:00pm


Price: $240 + tax 

If your are able to coach, reach out to Matt Frick - matt@iceandfield.com

 

Combination of 3 v 3 games and pick up games

This season is 10 weeks long with 1 practice & 1 game every week. Practices will focus on building Team & Individual skills. Players will be divided into 4 teams of even skill. This league is Perfect for 1st and 2nd year players or players graduating from LTP.

June 2nd -Aug 6th

Ice times: Tuesdays and Thursdays , 5:30pm and 6:45pm

Start Date: June 2nd - Aug 6th

Days of Week: Practices Tuesdays, 5:30-6:30pm (8u-10u)

Games Thursdays, 5:30-6:30pm (8u-10u) (We plan on 5 weeks of controlled scrimmages (coaches teach) and 5 weeks Regular games

Cost: $500 + Tax

This season is 10 weeks long with 1 practice & 1 game every week. Practices will focus on building Team & Individual skills. Players will be divided into 4 teams of even skill. This league is Perfect for 1st and 2nd year players or players graduating from LTP.

June 2nd -Aug 6th

Ice times: Tuesdays and Thursdays , 6:45pm

Start Date: June 2nd - Aug 6th

Days of Week: Practices Tuesdays, 6:45-7:45pm  (11u-14u)
 
Games Thursdays 6:45-7:45pm  (11u-14u)
